expected.notes: Assert the staking dashboard is visible and the DeFiStakingWidget mounts above the tabs with STAKE/UNSTAKE buttons, protocol select, amount input, execute button, and expected-yield readout.
Happy-path STAKE — default protocol is Lido (first staking protocol in mock catalog). Emits a STAKE row on the shared mock ledger.
Happy-path UNSTAKE — toggling operation to UNSTAKE switches the button highlight to rose and submits an UNSTAKE row.
Reactive-only scenario — no order placed. Switching the protocol select updates the Expected APY readout to the newly selected protocol's rate.
Reactive-only — typing an amount updates the Annual yield (mock) value from "—" to a non-empty formatted number.
